title: WEATHERIZATION SERVICES - 211info
text: REGION 30 WEATHERIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization services to lower monthly utility bills and improve home energy efficiency. Weatherization includes insulation installation and air sealing. Work is performed by local contractors in accordance with state and local building codes and is then inspected by certified staff. 306 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Income-eligible homeowners and renters (upon landlord's approval) Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 883-7186 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 883-7186 Main phone (541) 216-6138 FAX Main phone (541) 883-7186 Intake (541) 200-7022 ext 1029 Rosalba Delgadillo [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of Income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon, 1pm-5pm Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - NATIONAL FARMWORKER JOBS PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REGION 30
